title: bee_backlog.mjs add — schema-validated backlog append
action: Add an 'add' verb to skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_backlog.mjs: flags --type --title --severity --layer --detail --feature. Validate at the door: --type must be a KIND_ALIASES key OR an already-normalized value from NORMALIZED_KINDS (import both from lib/feedback.mjs — the digest merge path accepts both vocabularies; resolve the open question this way and note it in the cell trace); --severity in P1|P2|P3; --layer a non-empty string <=40 chars (NO allowlist — feedback.mjs treats layer as a free string and live backlog data already carries security; an invented enum would make security-layer friction unfileable); --title required, <=200 chars. Append one JSON line {ts (ISO now), type, title, detail, severity, layer, feature} (no source field — the collector overrides source with SRC_BACKLOG and never reads it) to .bee/backlog.jsonl. Rejection = ERROR/WHY/FIX naming the allowed values, exit non-zero, file untouched. Add test rows to test_lib.mjs: happy append parses and is picked up by buildDigest (not dropped), kind-style unknown type rejected, title >200 rejected. Copy the finished template to .bee/bin/bee_backlog.mjs.

truths: A line appended by add is never dropped as unknown_type by buildDigest
--type kind (the literal word) or any unknown type is rejected before any write
Template and .bee/bin vendor copy are identical
key_links: Validation imports KIND_ALIASES and NORMALIZED_KINDS from lib/feedback.mjs — never a duplicated literal list
prohibitions: Do not change KIND_ALIASES or the collector
Do not weaken any existing test_lib.mjs assertion

trace.outcome: Added bee_backlog.mjs add verb: validates --type against lib/feedback.mjs KIND_ALIASES/NORMALIZED_KINDS (never a duplicated literal), --severity P1|P2|P3, --layer free string <=40 chars (no allowlist), --title <=200 chars; appends {ts,type,title,detail,severity,layer,feature} (no source field) to .bee/backlog.jsonl atomically; rejects before any write. 7 new tests added to test_lib.mjs; vendor copy byte-identical.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs (feedback.mjs KIND_ALIASES/NORMALIZED_KINDS/buildDigest suite; bee_state.mjs CLI-entry suite used as the established pattern for the new bee_backlog.mjs CLI-entry tests)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "bee_backlog.mjs add appends a validated row and buildDigest picks it up (never dropped as unknown_type) (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs add accepts an already-normalized NORMALIZED_KINDS value for --type, not only a KIND_ALIASES key (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs add rejects --type \"kind\" (the literal word) and any other unrecognized type before any write (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs add rejects an oversize title, a bad severity, and an oversize/empty layer, leaving the file untouched (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs add accepts an arbitrary free-string --layer with no allowlist (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs counts/rank/badges verbs are unchanged by the add verb addition (new)",
    "bee_backlog.mjs with no command prints a Use: line listing all four verbs and exits non-zero (new)"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell .bee/backlog.jsonl was hand-appended with no validation. Live proof in this repo: buildDigest(root) over the real .bee/ tree drops 17 entries as unknown_type (node -e buildDigest(...).counts -> {\"entries\":55,\"dropped\":17,...}), including .bee/backlog.jsonl:1 which carries {\"kind\":\"friction\",...} instead of {\"type\":...} (collectFeedback reads only row.type) -- exactly the drift class the plan's Discovery section measured (19 kind:-drifted lines since 2026-07-10). The new add verb makes a fresh instance of this class impossible at the door: `node .bee/bin/bee_backlog.mjs add --type kind --title x --severity P1 --layer state` exits 1 with no write (manual smoke test), instead of silently landing a doomed-to-drop line.",
  "verification_run": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node .bee/bin/bee_backlog.mjs 2>&1 | grep -q 'add' && cmp skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_backlog.mjs .bee/bin/bee_backlog.mjs -> 143 passed, 0 failed; grep and cmp both exited 0",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}
